stages.purpose: Resolve the exact record and obtain its current date before any mutation is authorized.
After the first follow-up, update only the resolved record to the initially requested date.
After the correction, update the same record to the replacement date without repeating prior work.

response_constraints: After the search, report the exact match's stable ID and current date before following any later update instruction.
Do not update anything during the initial turn; on later turns, reuse the resolved exact-match ID without searching again.
Treat the last follow-up as a correction: update the same record to 2027-01-23, which supersedes 2026-11-23.
Never call telecom_notify and never update distractor record tel-618.
Describe completion only from tool results.
Do not infer fields absent from tool output; say that they are unknown.

follow_up_turns.content: Now move only that exact subscription to 2026-11-23. Keep its other fields unchanged and do not notify anyone.
Correction: keep working with the same record, but use 2027-01-23 instead. This replaces the date I just gave you; do not notify anyone.

prompt: Find the exact subscription “Home Fiber Subscription” at Family Account and show its currently stored date and stable ID. Do not change any record in this turn. Use only facts returned by the tools and label unavailable fields as unknown.
